title: Borrow<str> for Id/UTCDate: correct implementation satisfying Borrow contract
description: Borrow<str> requires Hash/Eq consistency: Id uses String's hash/eq and str uses the same hash/eq algorithm, so the contract is satisfied. A future contributor might suggest removing it as 'redundant with AsRef<str>' — but AsRef does not enable HashMap::get(&str) for HashMap<Id, V>; Borrow is required for that use case.
